description: Read-only, independent, verifiable eval scenarios for @feedock/mcp, per docs/features/mcp-server.md §8 (Phase-1 evals / mcp-builder Phase 4). Each question is multi-hop (forces several tool calls), stable (the answer will not drift on a frozen seeded project), and scored by string-match against `expectedAnswerContains`. Writes are excluded (non-reproducible); the friction tools (publish/merge) are tested separately via the unit + manual confirm-flow checks. Run these against a SEEDED project (packages/db seed fixture) through the stdio server + MCP Inspector. Target: >= 90% pass.

harness.scoring: string-match — pass if every string in expectedAnswerContains appears (case-insensitive) in the model's final answer

scenarios.question: How many Open feedback items have at least 10 votes, and what is the title of the top one by votes?
scenarios.multiHopReason: Filter by status=Open + sort=top, then count those with voteCount>=10 and read the top item's title.

scenarios.question: Which roadmap items are in the Now lane, and how many people asked for each?
scenarios.multiHopReason: List roadmap items, filter to column=Now, and read each item's peopleAsked rollup.

scenarios.question: For task T-<seed number>, what is its status and which pull request is linked to it?
scenarios.multiHopReason: Resolve the task id from its number via list_tasks, then get_task to read status + the linked git ref (PR).

scenarios.question: Which milestone has the highest progress %, and how many of its tasks are Done?
scenarios.multiHopReason: List milestones to find the max progressPct, then get_milestone for its doneTaskCount / Done tasks.

scenarios.question: What is the title of the most recent Published changelog entry?
scenarios.multiHopReason: List changelog entries, apply the client-side state=Published filter, and read the newest entry's title.

scenarios.question: Across the whole board, how many feedback items are in each status, and are any of those counts possibly truncated?
scenarios.multiHopReason: Call feedock_overview, read the per-status tally, and report the mayBeTruncated/atCap flags (lower-bound awareness).
